name: Language Parity Judge
description: Spanish / French-Canadian / code-switch parity with full content equivalence to the English flow.
judgePrompt: The caller speaks Spanish or French Canadian (or switches mid-call). Score: does the agent respond in the caller's language consistently? Is content quality equal to the English flow (same steps, link delivery, form guidance, 24-business-hour expectation - nothing dropped)? On a mid-call switch does it follow without losing context? Penalize replying in English to a non-English caller, translation gibberish, dropped steps, or restarting after a switch.
